## Problem / motivation

What limitation or gap does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature and its expected behaviour.

## Affected dimensions or commands

List the D1–D9 dimensions, CLI commands, or tile components involved, if known.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you evaluated and why you rejected them.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, rubric sections, or external references.
